name: Sarah Rahman
bio: Met in first year of university. We bonded over terrible cafeteria food and late-night study sessions. Now she's a UX designer in Dhaka.

name: James Wright
bio: My first manager at the startup. Taught me how to write clean code and communicate with stakeholders. Still meet for coffee every two weeks.

name: Priya Mehta
bio: We grew up on the same street and went to the same school for 10 years. Now she lives in London but we try to catch up every two weeks.

name: Carlos Mendez
bio: Met during a backpacking trip through Southeast Asia in 2022. We've stayed close ever since. He's the person I call when I need honest advice.

name: Emma Wilson
bio: My college roommate for three years. She moved to Melbourne after graduation. We used to talk every week but life got busy — I really need to call her.

name: David Kim
bio: We met at a hackathon and ended up building a project together that actually won third place. He's a backend developer who also loves board games.

name: Aisha Okonkwo
bio: We met at a book club two years ago and instantly clicked. She's a writer and always recommends the most underrated novels. Weekly calls are non-negotiable.

name: Liam Nakamura
bio: We've known each other since we were 6 years old. Our families used to go on holidays together. He moved to Tokyo for work and I haven't called in weeks.
